/usr/bin/cc  -O3 -march=native -fno-plt -fstrict-aliasing -fstack-protector-strong -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer CMakeFiles/imgengine_cli.dir/cmd/imgengine/main.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine_cli.dir/cmd/imgengine/args.c.o -o imgengine_cli  -Wl,-rpath,/workspaces/imgengine/imgengine/build libimgengine.so
